Events Entities Narratives Markets Methodology
Home Entities Russia

Russia

Country

BRICS, UN Security Council (permanent member), SCO

Objectives

Stated

  • 2026-04-11 Putin declared 32-hour Orthodox Easter ceasefire (4pm Saturday through Sunday) — Source: BBC, SCMP, The Hindu, TASS
  • 2026-04-12 Kremlin describes ceasefire as "humanitarian gesture by Putin" — Source: Kremlin spokesman
  • 2026-04-12 Putin offers to mediate US-Iran peace efforts — Source: Middle East Eye
  • 2026-04-12 Russia "ready to supply gas to EU if it has surplus" — Source: The Hindu

Revealed

  • 2026-04-11 Russian LNG deliveries to Spain rose 120% in March — exploiting Hormuz energy crisis to expand European market share — Source: TASS
  • 2026-04-11 Kremlin clarified Putin envoy's US visit does not mean Ukraine talks have resumed — maintaining leverage — Source: Kremlin via Multiple feeds
  • 2026-04-12 Russia reports ~2,000 Ukrainian ceasefire breaches while Ukraine reports 2,299 Russian violations — both sides violating own ceasefire — Source: Multiple feeds
  • 2026-04-12 RDIF CEO Dmitriev projects oil at $150/barrel — Russia benefits from high oil prices during Hormuz closure — Source: TASS
  • 2026-04-13 Russia resumed offensive operations in Sumy region after Easter ceasefire expired — Source: TASS
  • 2026-04-13 Lavrov to visit China April 14-15 for talks with Wang Yi — Source: TASS

Inferred

  • Hormuz crisis directly benefits Russian energy revenues via higher oil prices and expanded European gas market share
  • Easter ceasefire appears designed as diplomatic positioning rather than genuine peace effort given scale of violations from both sides

Claims & Track Record

  • 2026-04-11 Claimed: Easter ceasefire is genuine humanitarian gesture. Outcome: 2,000+ violations reported by both sides. Source: TASS, BBC
  • 2026-04-11 Claimed: Putin envoy US visit is not resumption of Ukraine talks. Outcome: pending. Source: Kremlin

Divergences

  • Stated: humanitarian ceasefire. Revealed: ceasefire widely violated, ~2,000 breaches reported by Ukraine. Confidence: HIGH
  • Stated: ready to supply gas to EU. Revealed: using Hormuz crisis to expand market share (LNG to Spain +120%). Confidence: MEDIUM

Connections

  • Allied with: Iran (diplomatic support, nuclear intermediary role, narrative alignment via TASS/RT), China (naval coordination, Cuba), Cuba (naval coordination), North Korea
  • Opposed to: Ukraine, NATO, United States
  • Coordinating with: China (China-Russia-Cuba naval coordination in western Atlantic)
  • Offers to: take Iran's enriched uranium (mediator positioning) — Sources: The Hindu (Regional), TASS (Russia-aligned)

Mentioned in Events
